hTERT.promoter_state: Germline-edited: CpG island methylation control region deleted
hTERT.activation: Shelterin density drop → ATM → TET2 demethylation → MYC/SP1 activation

ouroboric_telomere_endogenous.intervention: GERMLINE — hTERT promoter methylation control region deleted at embryo stage

layers.L1_SENSE: Shelterin density sensor — TRF2/POT1 occupancy threshold at 55%
layers.L2_SIGNAL: ATM → KAP1 → chromatin relaxation → p53 gradient
layers.L3_DEREPRESS: TET2-mediated CpG demethylation at hTERT promoter (accelerated by treople-enhanced chromatin stability)
layers.L5_EXTEND: Telomerase adds TTAGGG repeats with enhanced processivity
layers.L6_TERMINATE: G-quadruplex length sensor; enhanced stability from porphyrin intercalation (+5–15°C Tm)
layers.L7_SEAL: CST + Pol α fill-in; T-loop reformation

g4_enhancement.mechanism: Protoporphyrin IX and Mg-protoporphyrin IX π-stack with G-tetrads
g4_enhancement.termination_enhancement: Tighter extension ceiling at target length

ourboreum_integration.mechanism: Bioelectric synchronization of telomere maintenance across grove via mycorrhizal networks
ourboreum_integration.T_primitive_shift: 𐑸 → 𐑥 — telomere participates in collective crossing-point
ourboreum_integration.collective_memory: Shared epigenetic memory of telomere maintenance states

cell_cycle_params.notes: Slower division rate than base human (metabolic efficiency reduces turnover)

senescence_markers.notes: Senescence threshold raised due to ouroboric maintenance
